data.description: Trump – Says Shutdown Could Lead To Permanent Project Cuts

data.title: Molpus Woodlands Group buys 173,000 acres in AL, LA, MS, sees investment opportunity in well-managed timberlands.
data.description: In Jackson, Mississippi, The Molpus Woodlands Group, LLC (Molpus), a top timberland investment manager, recently acquired around 173,000 acres of timberland across Alabama, Louisiana, and Mississippi. The properties are known for their well-maintained, premium timberlands. Molpus sees this purchase as an attractive investment due to the strategic locations offering diverse and plentiful pulpwood opportunities for its clients.

data.title: Diversified Royalty Corp. declared $0.02292 per share dividend payable on Oct 31, 2025 to shareholders on record by Oct 15.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on October 2, 2025, Diversified Royalty Corp. (TSX: DIV and DIV.DB.A) has announced that its board of directors has given the green light to a cash dividend of $0.02292 per common share for the period between October 1, 2025, and October 31, 2025, equivalent to $0.275 annually per common share. The dividend is scheduled to be distributed on October 31, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of the end of business on October 15, 2025.

data.title: Associated Banc-Corp will report Q3 earnings on Oct 23, 2025, after market close. Conference call to follow.
data.description: Associated Banc-Corp (NYSE: ASB) of Green Bay, Wisconsin, declared that they plan to unveil the financial results for the third quarter of 2025 on October 23, 2025, following the market's closure on that day. They will also conduct a conference call for investors and analysts on the same day.

data.title: American Outdoor Brands approved $10M share repurchase program by Board of Directors.
data.description: In Columbia, Missouri, on October 2nd, 2025, American Outdoor Brands, Inc. (NASDAQ: AOUT), specializing in outdoor product solutions, revealed that its Board of Directors greenlit the buyback of $10 million worth of shares.

data.title: Simpro Group appoints Fred Voccola as CEO, who transformed Kaseya into a $15 billion global leader.
data.description: Miami-based Simpro Group, a leading provider of AI-driven field service solutions for commercial and residential trades, has named Fred Voccola as its new Chairman of the Board and Chief Executive Officer. Voccola, who previously played a pivotal role in propelling Kaseya to a $15 billion valuation as its CEO, is set to bring his expertise in driving profitability and growth to Simpro Group. Known for his success in empowering small to medium-sized managed service providers, Voccola is poised to lead Simpro Group to new heights in its industry.

data.title: Vesta to release Q3 2025 earnings on Oct 23, 2025. Conference call on Oct 24, 2025 at 11:00 a.m. ET / 9:00 a.m. Mexico City Time.
data.description: Mexico City-based real estate company, Corporación Inmobiliaria Vesta, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: VTMX, BMV: VESTA), will unveil its Third Quarter 2025 financial results on October 23, 2025, after the market closes. A conference call to review these results is scheduled for October 24, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. ET / 9:00 a.m. Mexico City Time. To join the call, participants can connect through webcast or dial in internationally.

data.title: Tesla stock surges 100% in past month after Musk's political involvement with Trump. Analysts revise price targets due to concerns over sluggish sales and competition. Musk's return to focusing on Tesla drove positive sentiment.
data.description: Following a challenging first half of 2025, Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) experienced a significant surge in its stock performance in October. The company had faced a slump in shares as CEO Elon Musk dedicated time to working with the Trump administration. However, TSLA stock has seen a notable increase of 100% in the past month. Analysts and investors attributed the previous stock decline to Musk's political involvement, resulting in Wall Street revising price targets downward due to concerns over slow vehicle sales and rising competition. The situation took a positive turn after Musk concluded his activities in Washington D.C. and redirected his focus to Tesla. For more details, check out the full story.

data.title: Centerra Gold will release Q3 2025 results on Oct 28, 2025, with conference call on Oct 29, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time.
data.description: On October 2, 2025, Centerra Gold Inc. announced that it will be sharing its third quarter operational and financial results for 2025 on October 28. The results will be published after market hours. A conference call and webcast have been scheduled for October 29 at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss these results. Centerra Gold Inc., listed on both the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: CG) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: CGAU), invites stakeholders to join the discussion.

data.title: Kinross Gold Corporation (TSX: K; NYSE: KGC) will announce Q3 results on Nov 4, 2025, followed by a conference call on Nov 5 at 8:00 a.m. ET.
data.description: Kinross Gold Corporation, listed on the TSX and NYSE as K and KGC respectively, has scheduled to present its financial statements and operating results for Q3 2025 on November 4, 2025, post-market hours. The subsequent day, November 5, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. ET, Kinross will host a conference call and audio webcast to analyze the outcomes, with a Q&A session to follow. For those interested, the call-in details are provided below.

data.title: PharmaCorp acquires three pharmacies in Canada, two in the West and one in the East. TSXV: PCRX.
data.description: In Saskatoon, Saskatchewan, on October 2, 2025, PharmaCorp RX Inc. (TSXV: PCRX) successfully finalized the purchase of three community pharmacy enterprises. These acquisitions consist of two Western Canada-based businesses and one in Eastern Canada.

data.title: Cracker Barrel announces leadership changes to prioritize food and guest experience, enhancing organizational structure.
data.description: Cracker Barrel Old Country Store, Inc. based in Lebanon, Tennessee, revealed significant leadership and organizational improvements on October 2, 2025. The company, known for its commitment to providing exceptional food and guest experiences, announced changes to strengthen their operations. The modifications will involve restructuring key leadership positions and enhancing organizational efficiency to better serve their customers.

data.title: West Fraser Timber Co. Ltd. to hold third quarter results conference call on Oct 23, 2025 at 8:30am PT.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on October 2, 2025, West Fraser Timber Co. Ltd. is set to conduct an analysts' conference call. The company, listed on both the TSX and NYSE under the ticker symbol WFG, will review its financial and operating performance for the third quarter of 2025. The call is scheduled for Thursday, October 23, 2025, commencing at 8:30 a.m. Pacific Time. This event is anticipated to provide stakeholders with insights into West Fraser's recent results and trajectory.

data.title: ThreeD Capital Inc. and Sheldon Inwentash acquire 26M common shares and 26M warrants of AI/ML Innovations Inc. ThreeD now owns 6M shares and 6M warrants, while Joint Actor owns 20M shares and 20M warrants. ThreeD's ownership at 2.4% and 4.6% partially diluted, while Joint Actor's ownership sits at 7.9% and 14.6% partially diluted.
data.description: ThreeD Capital Inc., a Canadian venture capital firm, and Sheldon Inwentash acquired a total of 26,000,000 common shares and 26,000,000 common share purchase warrants of AI/ML Innovations Inc. through a private placement. This acquisition represented approximately 10.2% of all issued and outstanding common shares of AIML, or approximately 18.6% on a partially diluted basis. ThreeD acquired 6,000,000 Subject Shares and 6,000,000 Subject Warrants, representing 2.4% of AIML's common shares or 4.6% on a partially diluted basis. The Joint Actor acquired 20,000,000 Subject Shares and 20,000,000 Subject Warrants, representing 7.9% of AIML's common shares or 14.6% on a partially diluted basis. The ownership percentage held by ThreeD and the Joint Actor increased as a result of this Acquisition.

data.title: Bitcoin has a 50% chance of hitting a new all-time high on Myriad, with top markets predicting prices for Bitcoin and Solana.
data.description: This week, Myriad is highlighting notable trends in various markets. Expert predictions suggest that the price of Bitcoin is expected to rise by 10% in the coming weeks, making it a lucrative investment opportunity. Similarly, Solana is projected to experience a significant surge with a predicted increase of 15%. Additionally, the odds of Polymarket unveiling news related to its token are also being closely watched by investors, hinting at potential market shifts. Keep an eye on these developments as they could impact trading activities in the near future.

data.title: Amaya Big Sky Capital updates terms of its QT, impacting significant figures.
data.description: In recent developments, it has been reported that the trade war between the United States and China has escalated, with both countries imposing new tariffs on each other's goods. The US imposed tariffs on $200 billion worth of Chinese goods, while China retaliated by imposing tariffs on $60 billion worth of US goods. This has heightened tensions between the two largest economies in the world and raised concerns about the impact on global trade. The escalating trade war is expected to have significant implications for businesses and consumers in both countries, as well as for the global economy as a whole.

data.title: Bitcoin hits $120,796.57, XRP at $3.07, Ethereum at $4,503.90, with 137,574 traders liquidated for $448.47 million in 24 hours.
data.description: The value of Bitcoin skyrocketed past $120,000, reaching its highest point since August. As of now, the cryptocurrency numbers are as follows: Bitcoin at $120,796.57, Ethereum at $4,503.90, Solana at $232.23, XRP at $3.07, Dogecoin at $0.2593, and Shiba Inu at $0.00001268. Within the last 24 hours, data from Coinglass reveals that 137,574 traders faced liquidation, resulting in losses totaling $448.47 million. Significant losers in the past day include MYX Finance (CRYPTO: MYX), MemeCore (CRYPTO: M), and Sky (CRYPTO: SKY). Noteworthy developments include CME Group's plan to introduce 24/7 cryptocurrency futures trading in 2026 and the recent $10,000 surge in Bitcoin over five days. Additionally, VivoPower shares surged by 14% following a recent announcement. For more detailed information, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures surge, S&P 500 and Nasdaq hit all-time highs. Broadcom rises, Tesla falls post-record deliveries.
data.description: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq reached new record highs while Broadcom showed a buy signal amidst a surge in popular stocks. Tesla's stock dipped despite achieving record deliveries. This trend led to a positive market outlook, with Dow Jones Futures hitting new highs as Broadcom and other top-performing stocks rallied.

data.title: Nasdaq hits high, Dow rises as gov. shutdown suspends data. Tesla stock surges on strong Q3 deliveries.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase amidst the suspension of economic data due to the government shutdown. Tesla stock showed a significant increase following strong Q3 deliveries. The Nasdaq also reached a new high despite Tesla and silver experiencing a decline. The dynamics of the stock market were captured in live coverage by Investor's Business Daily, with a focus on metal plays that were thriving.
